title: Hilton, Becerra lead in California’s governor primary. See live results here.
description: Latest California governor primary results as Democrats Katie Porter, Tom Steyer and Xavier Becerra and Republicans Chad Bianco, Steve Hilton vie for nominations to replace Gov. Gavin Newsom.

title: Former Biden official Deb Haaland wins New Mexico primary for governor
description: Haaland could make history as the first female Native American governor if she’s elected.

title: Eight takeaways from a big primary night in Iowa, California and more
description: In Iowa, Josh Turek won the Democratic nomination for Senate, defeating a rival who had criticized party leaders. Major races in California were not yet called.

title: America’s 250th birthday celebration increasingly centers on Trump
description: The White House has built a set of highly visible, centrally controlled events — many created by presidential directive — that emphasize spectacle, branding, and new traditions.

title: President Trump seeks control of science funding
description: The White House Office of Management and Budget is moving to take more control of billions of dollars in federal grants. Critics say the proposed change would jeopardize the integrity of U.S. science.

title: Bass advances in Los Angeles mayor race. See primary results live.
description: Latest Los Angeles mayoral primary results, as incumbent Karen Bass seeks reelection in a tight race with candidates Nithya Raman and Spencer Pratt.

title: The White House's new site about 'aliens' has nothing to do with UFOs
description: The site compares undocumented immigrants to extraterrestrials, refers to people as "it," and says "they do not belong here"

title: Secretary of State Marco Rubio faces questions about Iran war on Capitol Hill
description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is making the rounds on Capitol Hill for budget hearings, facing questions about how the war in Iran will end and when gas prices for Americans might return to normal.

title: Sen. Mark Warner on Bill Pulte being named acting national intelligence director
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Sen. Mark Warner of Virginia, the top Democrat on the Senate Intelligence committee, about mortgage chief Bill Pulte's move to acting director of national intelligence.

title: California's primary for governor is undecided as candidates vie to be in the top two
description: Republicans and Democrats all compete together in the unusual primary to set the one-on-one race in November. Two Democrats and one Republican were in close contention.

title: Iowa voters pick their nominees for competitive general elections
description: Democratic state Rep. Josh Turek will face Republican U.S. Rep. Ashley Hinson in the Senate race. For governor, Democrat state Auditor Rob Sand and Republican businessman Zach Lahn move on to November.

title: Supreme Court reinstates Republican-favored Alabama congressional districts
description: The ruling means that Alabama's 2026 midterm elections will feature six Republican-leaning districts and one Democratic-leaning one.

title: What Jill Biden’s memoir says about Melania, the East Wing and that debate
description: The former first lady defends her husband's 2024 decisions and capabilities in a book that also touches on Hunter Biden's trial, Barron Trump and taking up mah-jongg.

title: Pentagon hires convicted Jan. 6 rioter for sensitive counterterrorism job
description: The Trump administration’s appointment of Elias Irizarry, who was 19 at the time of the Capitol attack, has alarmed some in the Defense Department.

title: Rubio details U.S. demands as Iran peace talks falter
description: The secretary of state is testifying publicly to Congress for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmakers’ patience runs thin.

title: The DOJ won't move ahead with anti-weaponization fund, acting AG Todd Blanche says
description: The Justice Department is no longer moving ahead with its $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund. It was a tumultuous couple weeks for a controversial idea that was championed by some MAGA supporters.

title: DOJ is investigating former congressman George Santos for insider trading on Kalshi
description: The disgraced former congressman allegedly bet on whether he would appear at the State of the Union address, prompting federal investigations.

title: Trump and Netanyahu have a long history of working together but don't always agree
description: U.S. President Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu have a long history of working together, but the pair is under strain amid the ongoing war in Iran.

title: Ranking the 2028 Republican presidential contenders
description: Vance and Rubio top the list but there’s plenty of room for an anti-Trump candidate.
